## Summary

## Verification

- [ ] `npm ci`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run pack:dry-run`

## SmartThings/Homebridge Notes

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, authorization codes, or refresh tokens are logged.
- [ ] Homebridge errors are logged without crashing the bridge.
- [ ] Manual SmartThings device testing is documented if behavior changed.
